sections.paragraph:
Original: עלס

Transliteration: ‛âlas

Phonetic: aw-las'

BDB Definition:

  1. to rejoice
    1. (Qal) to rejoice
    2. (Niphal) to exult
      1. to flap joyously (of ostrich)
    3. (Hithpael) to delight oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1632

Part(s) of speech: Verb
